narrative:
Newark 1-B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,688 registered voters, with 68.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
